allowPhotoAccess: allow access to photos to set your avatar.

allInviteSlotsUsed: you have used all your invite slots
reportedThankYou: thank you for keeping flash. safe.
signOutConfirmSub: you can sign back in with your username.
replayTutorialConfirmSub: this will restart the onboarding walkthrough.

undoYourFlashSub: this deletes your photo and removes you from your pack. you'll lose your streak.
tooDarkToShareSub: we couldn't see anything in this shot. try again with more light.
blankImageSub: this photo is a flat, empty frame. take a real one and try again.
moderatedImageSub: it was flagged by content moderation.
revertYourFlashSub: this deletes your photo and removes you from your pack. you'll lose your streak.
captionSendSquad: looks good? send it to your pack.
savedToVibeHint: your filter is saved to your vibe profile
packExpiredSub: flashes vanish after they expire. upgrade to flash. pro to keep your packs in your vault forever.
commentingAs: you are commenting as @{{username}} · write once, locked forever
screenshotExplanation: when someone takes a screenshot of this pack, we track it so the pack knows it was saved.

your photo is out there.
matching you with your duet partner.
forming in {{time}}.
startADuetSub:
start a duet to connect with just one person.
perfect for intimate moments.
duetFormingSub:
take your first photo to unlock duets.
connect intimately with one person.
codeUsed: this code has already been used.
inviterNoSlots: the inviter is out of slots.
networkErrorServer: network error. is the server running?
uploadFailedAuth: your session expired. please sign in again.
uploadFailedTooLarge: this photo or live clip is too large. please retake it and try again.
uploadFailedServer: the server couldn't publish your flash. please try again shortly.
uploadFailedGeneric: check your connection and try again.
inviteOnlySub: invite only. get a code from a friend.
noCodeAskFriend: no code? ask a friend who's in.
inviteWarning: if someone you invite breaks the rules, your account is reviewed too.
onboarding_welcome_body: no followers. no likes. just you and three others sharing one photo a day.
onboarding_camera_body: one tap, one photo. add a filter if you want — just keep it real.
onboarding_packs_body: each day you're matched with three people. post your moment, then everyone's photos unlock at once.
onboarding_community_body: post daily to keep your streak alive. react to packs and discover moments from around the world.
onboarding_invite_body: flash. grows by invite only. copy your invite link to bring in your crew.
onboarding_go_body: your first pack is waiting. snap a photo to meet your crew.
pro_heroSub: unlock flash.live video bursts, pro filters, the pack vault, and more. one app. one tap. zero noise.
pro_tileBorderLabel: choose how your tiles look in packs
pro_fineprint: cancel anytime. lifetime is one-time. you'll be charged after a 7-day free trial on yearly plans.
pro_manageHintIos: opens your App Store subscription settings.
pro_manageHintAndroid: opens your Play Store subscription settings.
pro_subscribeNote: in-app purchases will be available in the next build. your interest is logged.
pro_unableToOpenSub: please manage your subscription from your device settings.
pro_cancelSub: you'll keep pro access until your current period ends, then lose flash.live, pro filters, the vault, and streak insurance.
pro_feat_live_body: capture 1.5-second silent looping video bursts directly in-camera to bring your packs to life.
pro_feat_reverts_body: change your mind any time within the 24h window — keep your streak.
pro_feat_vault_body: save unlimited packs. browse them as a private mosaic library.
pro_feat_filters_body: access 4 exclusive film LUTs: bonboa, daisy, earth, hibiscus.
pro_feat_borders_body: customize your tile border color so your friends always spot you in a pack.
pro_feat_invites_body: invite more friends. expand your flash. circle.
pro_feat_streak_body: one free streak save per month — no questions asked.
pro_feat_silent_body: hide your last seen and your city resolution to country only.
otp_subtitle_login: enter the one-time code sent to you.
otp_subtitle_signup: verify your invite. enter the one-time code.
otp_subtitle_signup_phone: verify your phone number. enter the one-time code.
otp_subtitle_signup_email: verify your email. enter the one-time code sent to your inbox.
otp_error_rateLimited: too many codes requested. wait a bit.
otp_error_sendFailed: couldn't send a code. try again.
otp_error_expired: code expired. go back and try again.
otp_error_tooManyAttempts: too many tries. request a new code.
settings_accessibility_hint: accessibility settings are saved locally and take effect immediately.
settings_not_available_body: biometric authentication is not set up on this device.
settings_biometric_enabled_body: you can now sign in with face id / touch id.
settings_two_factor_alert_body: two-factor authentication will be enabled in the next update.
settings_active_sessions_alert_body: you are currently signed in on 1 device.
settings_change_password_alert_body: contact support@flash.app to reset your password.
settings_pro_feature_body: silent mode is available with flash. pro.
settings_block_screenshots_alert_body: other users will still be notified if they screenshot your packs. this setting only blocks screenshots on your device where supported.
vault_empty_sub: your packs will appear here after you flash.
vault_pro_gate_sub: upgrade to flash. pro to unlock your pack vault.
screenshot_warning_body: your pack members have been notified. screenshots are allowed — but everyone knows.
screenshot_warning_repeat: repeat screenshots may flag for review
share_failed_dest: could not open a sharing destination.
report_warning_invite: the person who invited the reported user is also notified. repeat violations remove both accounts.
report_bug_intro: found something broken? the more detail, the faster we can fix it.
report_bug_hint: screenshots help a lot. send them to support@flash.app if you can.
report_bug_thanks: thank you for helping us squash bugs.
report_bug_failed: could not submit your report. try again later.
family_tree_founding_member: you're a founding member — no one above you.
family_tree_empty_descendants: no one yet — share your invite code to grow your tree.
lifecycle_why_p1: flash. is a moment, not a feed. every pack lives for {{bold_18h}} — then it vanishes. forever.
lifecycle_why_p2: no algorithm, no archive, no anxiety. you either shoot with the world right now, or you miss the moment. that scarcity is what makes a flash actually feel like a flash.
lifecycle_step0_body_admin: you take one photo. you can't redo it. you have unlimited time to undo.
lifecycle_step0_body_pro: you take one photo. you can't redo it. you have 4h to undo.
lifecycle_step0_body_free: you take one photo. you can't redo it. you have 2h to undo.
lifecycle_step1_body: 3 strangers shooting near the same time get matched into your pack.
lifecycle_step2_body: the mosaic drops. chemistry score, countries, the whole thing.
lifecycle_step3_body: one emoji, one comment per person. no threads, no replies.
lifecycle_step4_body: the pack expires. nobody can see it again — not you, not them.
lifecycle_vault_p: pro members can save unlimited packs to their {{bold_vault}} before they expire. free members can screenshot — but everyone in the pack gets notified.
chemistry_breakdown_sub: why this pack scored what it did
chemistry_footer: higher scores come from bigger, more global packs shot close in time with varied filters.
